title: AI Health Check: AI Operations & Governance Platform
description: A comprehensive full-stack AI Operations platform unifying service health monitoring, LLM-powered incident triage, model drift detection, and compliance reporting. Architected with a multi-layer safety pipeline and Human-in-the-Loop governance, it ensures secure, cost-effective, and auditable enterprise AI orchestration.
achievements: Human-in-the-Loop Governance: Architected a two-tier Claude Sonnet/Haiku pipeline where AI-drafted reports require human sign-off before being finalized.
Immutable Audit Logging: Implemented a SHA-256 hash-chain audit log to record every system action, ensuring tamper-proof compliance tracking.
Safety & Security Pipeline: Developed a multi-layer defense system including PII detection, injection prevention, and SSRF-protected service registration.
Atomic Budget Enforcement: Built a concurrency-safe 'lock-and-reserve' system for $5/day budget management, eliminating race conditions in LLM calls.

title: MedChat - Medical Chatbot with LLMs & RAG
description: A RAG-based medical Q&A chatbot that grounds LLM responses in a curated medical knowledge base. Built with LangChain and Pinecone for semantic retrieval, it uses Groq-hosted Llama 3.3 70B for fast inference, HuggingFace sentence-transformer embeddings for vector search, and a history-aware retriever to maintain multi-turn conversation context. Containerized with Docker and served via a Flask REST API.
achievements: RAG Pipeline: Built an end-to-end retrieval pipeline loading a medical PDF knowledge base, chunking into 500-token segments, embedding with all-MiniLM-L6-v2, and storing 384-dimension vectors in a Pinecone serverless index.

History-Aware Retrieval: Implemented context-aware question reformulation using LangChain's history-aware retriever, resolving ambiguous follow-up questions against prior chat history before retrieval.
Groq Inference: Integrated Groq's API serving Llama 3.3 70B for fast, scalable LLM inference without managing model infrastructure.
Containerized Deployment: Packaged the full application with Docker and deployed to a cloud environment, exposing a clean Flask REST API.

title: ResumeMatch AI
description: Developed a full-stack AI platform that matches resumes to over 100,000 real-world job postings. Built using FastAPI and Next.js, the system employs a multi-signal NLP pipeline (spaCy, Word2Vec, SBERT) to analyze semantic alignment, extract specialized skills, and validate years-of-experience against job requirements. Optimized for production with Docker and deployed as a scalable microservice architecture.
achievements: Custom NLP Pipeline: Built a line-by-line heuristic classifier to segment unstructured job descriptions into responsibilities and requirements.
Semantic Expansion: Implemented a Word2Vec model trained on 88k+ job posts to bridge the terminology gap between candidates and recruiters.
Production Engineering: Reduced database footprint by 95% (378MB to 13MB) for free-tier deployment without sacrificing search accuracy.
Table-Aware Parsing: Integrated specialized DOCX parsing to accurately extract text from complex resume templates.

title: Thyra Predict: Thyroid Disease Prediction System
description: Developed and deployed a supervised ML model achieving 98.37% accuracy across 1,500+ clinical test cases. Engineered an end-to-end pipeline including preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation. Optimized precision and recall across multi-class disease prediction, ensuring reliable diagnostic classification performance.
achievements: 98.37% Accuracy: Achieved 98.37% classification accuracy across 1,500+ clinical test cases on a multi-class thyroid disease dataset.
End-to-End Pipeline: Engineered a full ML pipeline covering data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation with no manual intervention between stages.
Multi-Class Optimization: Tuned precision and recall across multiple disease classes to ensure reliable diagnostic performance, not just overall accuracy.
Production Deployment: Deployed the trained model as a web application on Render, making predictions accessible via a live interface.
